resources.string: Please confirm your country code and enter your phone number.
Please enter your phone number\nor **log in using passkey >**
This account is already logged in from this app.
Contacts from this device will be added to this account.
Contacts from this device will not be added to this account.
Contacts from this device will be added to your account.
Turn on to continuously sync contacts from this device with your account.
Contacts from this device were added to your account.

The number you provided is too short for **%1$s**:

**%2$s**

Please enter the correct number including your country code.

If you didn't get the code by SMS or call, please check your **cellular data settings** and phone number:

**%1$s**

Your remaining options are to try another number or to contact Telegram Support. Tap **Help** to send us the technical details so that we can identify the problem.
We’ve sent an SMS with an activation code to your phone **%1$s**.
We\'ve sent the code to the **Telegram** app on your other device.
We\'ve sent the code to the **Telegram** app for %1$s on your other device.
Get the code for %1$s in the Anonymous Numbers section on Fragment.
We\'re calling your phone **%1$s**.\n\nDon\'t accept the call, Telegram will process everything automatically.
Calling your phone **%1$s** to dictate the code.
You entered the wrong code. Please try again.
Send the code as an SMS

Somebody with access to **%1$s** has requested to delete your Telegram account and reset your 2-Step Verification password.\n\nIf this wasn\'t you, please enter the code we\'ve just sent you via SMS. You can also cancel this by *changing your phone number*.
Since the account **%1$s** is active and protected by a password, we will delete it in 1 week for security purposes.\n\nYou can cancel this process at any time.
You\'ll be able to reset your account in:
Your recent attempts to reset this account have been cancelled by its active user. Please try again in 7 days.
The deletion process was cancelled for your account %1$s. You may close this window now.
Your login code is **%1$s**. Enter it in the Telegram app where you are trying to log in.\n\nDo not give this code to anyone.
You can request an SMS in %1$d:%2$02d
You can request a new SMS in %1$d:%2$02d
You can request a voice call in %1$d:%2$02d
Call me to dictate the code
Get the code via phone call
Enter your name and add a profile picture.
You have just successfully transferred %1$s to %2$s for %3$s
You have just successfully transferred %1$s to %2$s for %3$s until %4$s
You have just successfully transferred %1$s to %2$s
You have just successfully transferred %1$s to %2$s until %3$s
You successfully transferred %1$s to %2$s for %3$s and allowed future recurrent payments
You successfully transferred %1$s to %2$s and allowed future recurrent payments
Sorry, it is not possible to deliver to your address.
You can save your shipping info for future use.
You can save your payment info for future use.
Please *turn on Two-Step Verification* to enable this.
Your card %1$s is on file. To pay with this card, please enter your 2-Step-Verification password.
Sorry, the payment was cancelled by the bot.
Unable to reach payment server. Please check your internet connection and try again.
There was an error during payment confirmation.

Neither Telegram, nor %1$s will have access to your credit card information. Credit card details will be handled only by the payment system, %2$s.\n\nPayments will go directly to the developer of %1$s. Telegram cannot provide any guarantees, so proceed at your own risk. In case of problems, please contact the developer of %1$s or your bank.
Please create a password to protect your payment info. You\'ll be asked to enter it when you log in.
Please enter a valid email address. It is the only way to recover a forgotten password.
Phone will be passed to %1$s as billing info.
Email address will be passed to %1$s as billing info.
Phone and email address will be passed to %1$s as billing info.
No app found to handle this deep link.
There were no results for \"%s\".\nTry a new search.
Start messaging by tapping the pencil button in the bottom right corner.
Start messaging by tapping the pencil button in the bottom right corner.
Automatically delete new messages after a certain period of time for you and %1$s.
Automatically delete new messages after a certain period of time for members of this group.
Automatically delete new messages after a certain period of time for subscribers of this channel.
Automatically delete new messages sent in this chat after a certain period of time.
Messages in this chat are automatically\ndeleted %1$s after they are sent.
New messages in this chat will be automatically deleted in %1$s.
Are you sure you want to delete this contact?
Are you sure you want to delete these contacts?
Swipe left on the archive to hide it.
Swipe down to see the archive.
Hide the archive by swiping left on it.
Are you sure you want to remove **%1$s** from suggestions?
Sorry, you can\'t pin any more chats to the top.

**Telegram** needs access to your contacts so that you can connect with your friends across all your devices. Your contacts will be continuously synced with Telegram\'s heavily encrypted cloud servers.
Please allow Telegram to send you notifications to stay in touch with your friends and family.
Learn when you are mentioned in groups
Mute specific chats and types of chats
Chats with enabled notifications get unarchived when new messages arrive.
Chats with disabled notifications stay archived when new messages arrive.
You can pin an unlimited number of archived chats to the top.
Hold this button to schedule your message or send it without sound.
Long tap to send your message later.
You are receiving many new chats from users who are not in your Contacts List. Do you want have such chats **automatically muted** and **archived**?
You will receive a notification whenever **%s** posts a new story.
There were no results for %s.\nTry another hashtag.
Music from all your chats will be shown here.
Files from all your chats will be shown here.
Links from all your chats will be shown here.
Voice from all your chats will be shown here.
Media from all your chats will be shown here.
Tap on the button to start a new chat
Create a New Group to Import
Create a New Channel For This
You don\'t have channels that meet the requirements for this bot
Create a New Group For This
You don\'t have groups that meet the requirements for this bot
No users found that meet the requirements for this bot
Unable to import history to selected chat.
You must be an admin in the group to import messages.
The file format is for a group, but you selected a user.
The file format is for a user, but you selected a group.
Unable to import messages due to privacy settings.
Do you want to import messages from **%1$s** to the chat with **%2$s**?
Do you want to import messages to the chat with **%1$s**?
Do you want to import messages from **%1$s** to the group **%2$s**?
Do you want to import messages to the group **%1$s**?
You can only import messages into private chats with users with whom you are mutual contacts.
You must be an admin in the group to import messages.
This message was imported from another app. We can\'t guarantee it\'s real.
Please keep Telegram open\nuntil the import is completed.
Save space on your device by importing more chats to Telegram.
Or choose one of your contacts
Do you want to close the attach menu?
Display shortcuts to your most important chats for quick access.\n\nIf nobody is selected, your most frequent contacts will be shown in this widget.
Display the latest message from the chats you choose.\n\nIf no specific chats are selected, your most recent chats will be shown in this widget.
Note: Your passcode will be **ignored** for widgets.
You can add administrators to help you manage your group. Tap and hold to remove them.
Delete the group for all members
un1 added you to this group
Are you sure you want to leave the group?
Are you sure you want to leave **%1$s**?
Sorry, you can\'t add this user to groups.

Sorry, if a person is no longer part of a group, you need to be in their Telegram contacts in order to add them back.\n\nNote that they can still join via the group\'s invite link as long as they are not in the Removed Users list.
Sorry, too many administrators in this group.
Sorry, the target user has too many public groups or channels already. Please ask them to make one of their existing groups or channels private first.
Sorry, the target user owns too many location-based groups. Please ask them to delete or transfer an existing one first.
Sorry, you have too many location-based groups already. Please delete one of your existing ones first.
Sorry, too many bots in this group.
This group was upgraded to a supergroup
Users removed from the group by the admins can\'t rejoin via invite links.
Users removed from the channel by the admins can\'t rejoin via invite links.

If you set a permanent link, other people will be able to find and join your channel.

You can use a-z, 0-9 and underscores.
Minimum length is 5 characters.

If you set a permanent link, other people will be able to find and join your group.

You can use a-z, 0-9 and underscores.
Minimum length is 5 characters.
People can join your channel by following this link. You can revoke the link any time.
People can join your group by following this link. You can revoke the link any time.
You can provide an optional description for your channel.
You have changed some settings in this group. Apply changes?
You have changed some settings in this channel. Apply changes?
Public channels can be found in search, anyone can join them.
Public groups can be found in search, chat history is available to everyone and anyone can join.
Private channels can only be joined via an invite link.
Private groups can only be joined if you were invited or have an invite link.
Channels are a tool for broadcasting your messages to unlimited audiences.
Sorry, this name is already taken.
Channel names must have at least 5 characters.
The name must not exceed 32 characters.
Channel names can\'t start with a number.
Group names must have at least 5 characters.
Group names can\'t start with a number.
What can members of this group do?
Wait! Deleting this channel will remove all members and all messages will be lost. Delete the channel anyway?
Are you sure you want to leave the channel?
Are you sure you want to leave **%1$s**?
You will lose all messages in this channel.
Please choose a link for your public channel, so that people can find it in search and share with others.\n\nIf you\'re not interested, we suggest creating a private channel instead.
un1 sent you a gift for **un2**
You have sent a gift for **un2**
un1 sent an upgrade worth **un2** for your gift
You sent an upgrade worth **un2** for **un1**\'s gift
You won the auction with a bid of **un2**
**un1** sent a gift to **un2** for %d Star
**un1** sent a gift to **un2** for %d Stars
**un1** turned the gift from you into a unique collectible
**un1** turned the gift into a unique collectible
You turned the gift from **un1** into a unique collectible
You turned the gift into a unique collectible
You started displaying %s on your Telegram profile page.
**un1** sent a gift to **un2** for %d Star!
**un1** sent a gift to **un2** for %d Stars!
**un1** sent a gift to **un2** for %s TON!
You bought this gift for %s TON
**un1** bought you a gift for %s TON!
You bought this gift for %d Star
You bought this gift for %d Stars
**un1** bought you a gift for %d Star!
**un1** bought you a gift for %d Stars!
You sold this gift for %s TON
You sold this gift for %d Star
You sold this gift for %d Stars
You won a prize in a giveaway organized by **un1**.\n\nYour prize is **%d Star**.
You won a prize in a giveaway organized by **un1**.\n\nYour prize is **%d Stars**.
Sorry, you have reserved too many public usernames. You can revoke the link from one of your older groups or channels, or create a private entity instead.
Turn this on to always allow users who boosted your group to send messages and media.
Choose how many boosts a user must give to the group to bypass restrictions on sending messages.
Telegram will filter more spam, but may occasionally affect ordinary messages. You can report False Positives in Recent Actions.
You can manage anti-spam settings in %s
Switch on to hide the list of members in this group. Admins will remain visible.
Turn this on to let members of the group to add short tags next to their names.
Telegram moderators will review your report. Thank you!
Only channel administrators can see this list.
Anyone on Telegram will be able to join your channel by following this link.
You can add administrators to help you manage your channel. Tap and hold to remove admins.
Sorry, this channel is private, so you can’t view its content.
Sorry, you can\'t access this chat because you were banned by an admin.
Unfortunately, you were banned from participating in public groups.
Sorry, this chat is no longer accessible.

Sorry, if a person is no longer part of a channel, you need to be in their Telegram contacts in order to add them back.\n\nNote that they could still join via the channel\'s invite link as long as they are not in the Removed users list.
Sorry, you can\'t add this user to channels.
Sorry, too many admins in this channel.
Sorry, too many bots in this channel.
Sorry, you can only add the first 200 members to a channel. Note that an unlimited number of people may join via the channel\'s link.
Sorry, you are a member of too many groups and channels. Please leave some before creating a new one.
Sorry, you are a member of too many groups and channels. Please leave some before joining a new one.
un1 added you to this channel
Sorry, you can\'t send messages to this channel.
Members will be notified when you post
Members will receive a silent notification
Add names of the admins to the messages they post.
A custom title that will be shown to all members instead of \'%1$s\'.
Add short tag next to %1$s’s name.
Allow this bot to approve new members using its own interfaces, such as captchas.
You can transfer this group to **%1$s** only if you:
You can transfer this channel to **%1$s** only if you have:
You can withdraw only if you have:
Enabled **2-Step Verification** more than **7 days** ago.
Logged in on this device more than **24 hours** ago.
You can transfer your gift to TON if you have:
Enabled **2-Step Verification** more than **7 days** ago.
Logged in on this device more than **24 hours** ago.
This will transfer the **full owner** rights for **%1$s** to **%2$s**.
This will transfer the full **owner rights** for **%1$s** to **%2$s**.
**%1$s** is now the owner of the group.
**%1$s** is now the owner of the channel.
You cannot edit the rights of this admin.
This permission is not available in public groups.
This permission is not available in discussion groups.
You have changed this user\'s rights in **%1$s**. Apply changes?
New members will see messages that were sent before they joined.
New members won\'t see earlier messages.
New members won\'t see more than 100 previous messages.
Tap to add a permanent link
Create a sticker from a photo
Are you sure you want to add this bot as an admin to the channel **%1$s**?
Are you sure you want to add this bot as an admin to the group **%1$s**?
Bots can only be added as administrators.
Sorry, bots can only be added to channels as administrators.
%1$s will be removed from admins if you restrict them.
Add a group chat for comments
Select a group chat that will host comments from your channel.
Everything you post in the channel will be forwarded to this group.
**%1$s** is selected as the group that hosts comments for your channel.
**%1$s** is linking the group as its discussion board.
All new messages posted in this channel are forwarded to the group.
Do you want to make **%1$s** the discussion board for **%2$s**?
Do you want to make **%1$s** the discussion board for **%2$s**?\n\nAny member of this group will be able to see messages in the channel.
Do you want to make **%1$s** the discussion board for **%2$s**?\n\nAnyone from the channel will be able to see messages in this group.
\"Chat history for new members\" will be switched to Visible.
Are you sure you want to unlink **%1$s** from this group?
Are you sure you want to unlink **%1$s** from this channel?
Choose how long each member must wait before sending their next message.
Members will be able to send only one message every %1$s.
Slow Mode is enabled. You can\'t send more than one message at once.
Slow Mode is enabled. You can\'t select more items.
Sorry, this text is too long to send as one message.\n\nSlow Mode is enabled. You can\'t send more than one message at once.
Sorry, checklists can’t be forwarded to channels.
Sorry, checklists can’t be forwarded to secret chats.
Sorry, public polls can’t be forwarded to channels.
Sorry, invoices can’t be forwarded to secret chats.
Sorry, polls can’t be forwarded to secret chats.
Sorry, games can’t be sent to secret chats.
Sorry, invoices can’t be sent to secret chats.
Tap to choose the correct answer
You have added the maximum number of options.
You have added the maximum number of tasks.
If you stop this poll now, nobody will be able to vote in it anymore. This action cannot be undone.
If you stop this quiz now, nobody will be able to vote in it anymore. This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to discard this poll?
Are you sure you want to discard this Checklist?
You cannot send reactions in this chat.
Results will appear after the poll ends
Poll stats are not available now
**No actions here yet**\n\nThe group\'s members and admins have not taken any service actions in the last **48** hours.
**No actions here yet**\n\nThe channel\'s admins have not taken any service actions in the last **48** hours.
This is a list of all service actions taken by the group\'s members and admins in the last 48 hours.
This is a list of all service actions taken by the channel\'s admins in the last 48 hours.
un1 set a new group photo
un1 set a new channel photo
un1 set a new group video
un1 set a new channel video
un1 changed the group sticker set
un1 removed the group sticker set
un1 changed the group emoji pack
un1 removed the group emoji pack
un1 made un2 the discussion group for this channel
un1 removed the discussion group un2
un1 linked this group to un2
un1 unlinked this group from un2
un1 made group history visible for new members
un1 made group history hidden for new members
un1 set the slow mode timer to %1$s
un1 allowed new participants to speak
un1 changed group usernames from %1$s to %2$s
un1 changed topic name from un2 to un3
un1 changed channel color from %1$s to %2$s
un1 changed channel emoji from %1$s to %2$s
un1 changed channel color and icon from %1$s to %2$s
un1 changed channel profile color and icon from %1$s to %2$s
un1 changed channel emoji status from %1$s to %2$s
un1 changed channel emoji status to %2$s
un1 changed channel emoji status from %1$s to %2$s (for %3$s)
un1 changed channel emoji status to %2$s (for %3$s)
un1 changed group color from %1$s to %2$s
un1 changed group emoji from %1$s to %2$s
un1 changed group color and icon from %1$s to %2$s
un1 changed group profile color and icon from %1$s to %2$s
un1 changed group emoji status from %1$s to %2$s
un1 changed group emoji status to %2$s
un1 changed group emoji status from %1$s to %2$s (for %3$s)
un1 changed group emoji status to %2$s (for %3$s)
un1 changed their tag from «%1$s» to «%2$s»
un1 changed un2’s tag from «%1$s» to «%2$s»
There are no matches with **%1$s** in your music library.
You can choose a sticker set that will be available to all group members when they are chatting in this group.
You can create your own custom sticker sets using the @stickers bot.
You can create your own custom emoji packs using the @stickers bot.
All members will be able to use these emoji in the group, even if they don\'t have Telegram Premium.
Unlike other apps, Telegram never uses your private data to target ads. [Learn more in the Privacy Policy](https://telegram.org/privacy#5-6-no-ads-based-on-user-data)

Unlike other apps, Telegram doesn\'t track whether you tapped on a sponsored message and doesn\'t profile you based on your activity. We also prevent external links in sponsored messages to ensure that third parties can’t spy on our users. We believe that everyone has the right to privacy, and technological platforms should respect that.

Telegram offers free and unlimited service to hundreds of millions of users, which involves significant server and traffic costs. In order to remain independent and stay true to its values, Telegram developed a paid tool to promote messages with user privacy in mind. We welcome responsible advertisers at:
Ads should no longer be synonymous with abuse of user privacy. Let us redefine how a tech company should operate – together.
Telegram Ads are very different from ads on other platforms. Ads such as this one:
Ads on Telegram do not use your personal information and are based on the channel in which you see them.
50% of the revenue from Telegram Ads goes to the owner of the channel where they are displayed.
You can turn off ads by subscribing to **Telegram Premium**, and Level %1$s channels can remove them for their subscribers.
You can turn off ads by subscribing to **Telegram Premium**.
Anyone can create an ad to display in this channel — with minimal budgets. Check out the **Telegram Ad Platform** for details. %1$s
Ads on Telegram do not use your personal information and are based on the bot in which you see them.
50% of the revenue from Telegram Ads goes to the owner of the bot where they are displayed.
Anyone can create an ad to display in this bot — with minimal budgets. Check out the **Telegram Ad Platform** for details. %1$s
%s invited you to join a secret chat.
You have invited %s to join a secret chat.
Leave no trace on our servers
Allow %1$s to pass your Telegram name and id (not your phone number) to pages you open with this bot?
Please let us know if this group is not related to this location:\n\n**%1$s**
Please let us know if this group is not related to this location.
Do you want to block **%1$s** from messaging and calling you on Telegram?
Do you want to block messages from **%1$s**?
Are you sure you want to report spam from this user?
Are you sure you want to report spam from this group?
Are you sure you want to report spam from this channel?
Are you sure you want to report reaction from this user?
Are you sure you want to delete reaction from this user?
Sorry, you can only send messages to mutual contacts at the moment.
Sorry, you can only add mutual contacts to groups at the moment.
Sorry, you are currently restricted from posting to public groups.
Tap here to access saved GIFs
Do you want to pin an older message while leaving a more recent one pinned?
Do you want to pin this message for all members in the group?
Do you want to pin this message in this channel?
Do you want to pin this message at the top of the chat?
Do you want to unpin this message?
Do you want to clear all your recent emoji?
Do you want to clear your recent emoji statuses and reset suggestions?
Please enter any additional details relevant to your report.
Telegram moderators will study your report.\nThank you for your cooperation!
Forward messages here to save them
Send media and files to store them
Access this chat from any device
Use search to quickly find things
Hold to record audio. Tap to switch to video.
Hold to record video. Tap to switch to audio.
Send on MMM d at HH:mm
Send on MMM d yyyy at HH:mm
Remind on MMM d at HH:mm
Remind on MMM d yyyy at HH:mm
Start on MMM d at HH:mm
Start on MMM d yyyy at HH:mm
Starts on MMM d at HH:mm
Starts on MMM d yyyy at HH:mm
Publish on MMM d at HH:mm
Publish on MMM d yyyy at HH:mm
